name: clanspress
description: Community management system for gamers and sports teams plugin for Wordpress.
author: Kernow.dev

scripts.build:blocks:manifests: wp-scripts build-blocks-manifest --input=build/matches --output=build/matches/blocks-manifest.php && wp-scripts build-blocks-manifest --input=build/players --output=build/players/blocks-manifest.php && wp-scripts build-blocks-manifest --input=build/teams/team-card --output=build/teams/team-card/blocks-manifest.php && wp-scripts build-blocks-manifest --input=build/teams/team-create-form --output=build/teams/team-create-form/blocks-manifest.php
scripts.build:blocks: wp-scripts build --source-path=src/blocks --output-path=build --webpack-copy-php && npm run build:blocks:manifests && npm run build:cp-match-editor:integrate
scripts.build:cp-match-editor:integrate: wp-scripts build index.js --output-path=.cp-match-editor-build --source-path=src/cp-match-editor/src && rm -rf build/cp-match-editor && mkdir -p build/cp-match-editor && cp -R .cp-match-editor-build/. build/cp-match-editor/ && rm -rf .cp-match-editor-build
scripts.build:production: npm run build:admin && npm run build:blocks
